grievances.title: Assignment Grading Issue
grievances.description: Requesting re-evaluation of Assignment 3 in Data Structures course. I believe there might be a calculation error in the grading. I have attached my assignment for review.

grievances.title: Unable to Access LMS Portal

grievances.title: Scholarship Application Delay
grievances.description: Applied for merit scholarship on Feb 15, but status is still showing as pending verification. Requesting update on application status.
grievances.resolution: Scholarship approved. Amount will be credited by next week.

grievances.title: Class Schedule Conflict
grievances.description: Data Structures and Web Development are scheduled at the same time slot on Wednesdays. Requesting schedule adjustment.
